linapro-storage-aws.name: Object Storage - AWS S3
linapro-storage-aws.description: Provides an official AWS S3 backend for the host Storage domain capability.

settings.description: Enter your official AWS S3 access keys, region, and bucket below. Enable only one cloud storage plugin at a time. If the configuration is incomplete, object storage operations will fail—the system will not automatically switch to local disk. For MinIO, R2, or other S3-compatible services, use the S3 Storage plugin instead.
settings.accessKeyIdHelp: AWS access key ID used by the S3 SDK.
settings.secretAccessKeyHelp: AWS secret access key. Leave empty to keep the previously saved value.
settings.secretAccessKeyKeepPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the saved secret
settings.regionHelp: AWS region of the target bucket (for example us-east-1).
settings.pathPrefixHelp: Optional key prefix applied under the host-scoped object key.
settings.corsNote: Browser direct upload/download requires the bucket CORS policy to allow your workbench origin, methods PUT/GET/POST (as needed), and headers such as Content-Type and Authorization/x-ms-* when applicable.
